examples: Always make sure you hold the bulkhead fittings securely with a wrench when tightening fittings.
The real strong one of the bunch is the bulkhead.
BULKHEAD, a structural partition in the fuselage or wing.
Weep hole: hole through a solid revetment, bulkhead or seawall for relieving water pressure.
We have a watertight bulkhead up there and when we opened it, water came pouring out.
